title: Excellence
desc: We strive for the best in everything we do — from our appraisal engine to our pickup crew.

title: Speed
desc: Time is precious. Our streamlined process delivers real offers in minutes, not days.

title: Integrity
desc: Honesty is our foundation. The offer you receive is the amount you get — no last-minute lowballing.

title: Customer Obsession
desc: You're at the heart of our business. Every feature we build exists to make your experience smoother.

title: Innovation
desc: Always ahead of the curve, using live market data and smart tech to maximize your payout.

title: Community
desc: Proudly Canadian. We reinvest in the communities we serve from coast to coast.
